chapters.title: General Provisions
chapters.description: Subject matter, scope, definitions, and AI literacy obligations.

chapters.title: Prohibited AI Practices
chapters.description: Eight categories of absolutely banned AI uses including subliminal manipulation, social scoring, and untargeted facial recognition scraping.

chapters.title: High-Risk AI Systems
chapters.description: Largest chapter covering classification, requirements, provider/deployer obligations, notified bodies, and conformity assessment.

sections.title: Classification of AI Systems as High-Risk
Obligations of Providers and Deployers of High-Risk AI Systems and Other Parties

chapters.title: Transparency Obligations for Providers and Deployers of Certain AI Systems
chapters.description: Disclosure obligations for chatbots, deepfakes, emotion recognition, and biometric categorisation systems.

chapters.title: General-Purpose AI Models
chapters.description: GPAI classification, obligations for all providers, additional requirements for systemic-risk models, and Codes of Practice.

chapters.title: Measures in Support of Innovation
chapters.description: AI regulatory sandboxes, real-world testing conditions, and support measures for SMEs and start-ups.

chapters.title: Governance
chapters.description: AI Office, European AI Board, Scientific Panel of Independent Experts, Advisory Forum, and national competent authorities.

chapters.title: EU Database for High-Risk AI Systems
chapters.description: EU-wide registration database for high-risk AI systems.

chapters.title: Post-Market Monitoring, Information Sharing and Market Surveillance
chapters.description: Post-market monitoring obligations, serious incident reporting, market surveillance authority powers, and enforcement mechanisms.

chapters.title: Codes of Conduct and Guidelines
chapters.description: Voluntary codes of conduct for non-high-risk AI and Commission guidelines.

chapters.title: Delegation of Power and Committee Procedure
chapters.description: Delegated acts authority and examination committee procedure.

chapters.title: Penalties
chapters.description: Three tiers of administrative fines, SME/start-up provisions, and GPAI-specific penalties.

chapters.title: Final Provisions
chapters.description: Entry into force (1 August 2024), phased application timeline, amendments to existing EU legislation, and transitional provisions.
